Yenson is a Senior AI Solution Architect at Microsoft (via Accenture) and the sole AI advisor for Microsoft for Startups across LATAM. He architects agentic systems on Azure, runs migrations with Claude Code and MCP, and is the founder of Presencia Studio — open to a short list of advisory engagements each quarter.

What sets him apart is being an early adopter who became an expert: production agent work spans Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, the Microsoft Agent Framework, Azure Agent Dev Kit, and MCP — paired with AZ-204 and AI-102 certifications and a Solution Architect track record at Microsoft.

Signature case study: a US-based Y Combinator startup needed to leave Vercel + GCP for Azure to unlock Microsoft for Startups credits. He authored the end-to-end migration architecture and executed it in one week using Claude Code, MCP, and Azure Agent Dev Kit — zero customer-visible downtime.

He's best suited for founders and engineering teams who want depth without a six-month consulting wrapper: agentic system design, Azure migrations, LLM productionization, and enablement for teams that need to ship like they're bigger than they are.

Career arc: from Tier-2 support at DocuSign, to engineering at Wind River with three promotions in two years, to leading AI architecture at Microsoft — now founding Presencia Studio and advising the startups Microsoft bets on. Booking lives at presencia.studio.
